title: Infinity Master Gauntlet [IMG]
description: An Infinity Master Gauntlet mod adds an Infinity Master Gauntlet also the most OP item
body:
Hello, R10XA here i just made this Infinity Master Gauntlet mod and i really really like the stuff the Gauntlet does its really really OP :D
### What does the Infinity Master Gauntlet Mod do? [P1] ###
well simple it has only an item but its the item thats so special extremely OP spawns diamond or yeah u get it around when clicking the right click!
### Craft the item! ###
![the crafting recepie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/386328f420093dbe463dd8d12cf3bcdbaa17eca2.png)
### What does this mod do? [P2] ###
simple adds a Master Gauntlet with cool abilities but some of them arent too good and what i mean by that well some abilities are against u but if you are lucky u can get rich with this OP item
